{{template config_path="design/email/header_template"}}

{{trans "Don't let your recipes suffer. Revisit your cart for important items your culinary endeavours can't do without and make the most of our current offers before they expire."}}

{{trans "Inspiration awaits you! Check out today."}}

{{layout handle="ace_email_quote_items" quoteId=$quoteId area="frontend"}}
{{trans 'Your cart here' checkout_url=$checkout_url |raw}}

{{depend coupon_code}} {{trans "How about receiving the coupon %couponCode discount to enlighten your day with us?" couponCode=$coupon_code |raw}}
{{/depend}} {{depend to_date}} {{trans "It’ll be available to %to" to=$to_date}} {{/depend}}

{{trans "Thanks for thinking about %store_name‘s offers again. We hope to see your response soon." store_name=$store.getFrontendName()}}

{{template config_path="design/email/footer_template"}}
